historical_commits.message: Restart with arbitray number of cores after epmatwp has been written to file
historical_commits.relevance: Introduced restart-aware epmatwp lifecycle and deallocation logic.

historical_commits.message: Debug closing epmatwp file in sequential.
historical_commits.relevance: Confirms the sequential epmatwp path historically required distinct file-lifetime handling.
Explicitly describes debugging the sequential version and epmatwp file-unit handling.

normal_preparation_etf_mem_0: ws_indexes_distribution computes irg_start, irg_stop, nirg_loc, irn_start, irn_stop and nirn_loc
restart_common: epwread=true and epbread=false bypass the normal build_wannier allocation block
ws_indexes_distribution computes the same distribution variables
epw_read is responsible for restoring epmatwp
build_wannier calls wigner_divide_ndegen_epmat after epw_read returns
restart_mpi: MPI_FILE_READ_AT_ALL reads the local distributed records
MPI_BCAST distributes the local block within the image
restart_serial: no allocation of epmatwp is visible after the normal allocation block was bypassed
davcio is called with epmatwp(:,:,:,:,irg) for irg=1..nrr_g
wigner_divide_ndegen_epmat later divides slices of epmatwp
the observed execution terminates at the first such division

candidate_causes.candidate: missing serial restart allocation of epmatwp
evidence_for: normal preparation allocates the array before use
restart bypasses the normal allocation block
MPI epw_read explicitly replaces the missing allocation
the backtrace fails when the serial restart array is first divided
direct-access unformatted I/O is compiler-layout dependent
evidence_against: preparation and replay used the same binary and compiler
the complete state was copied byte-for-byte
the source shows an independent allocation defect sufficient to explain the failure

candidate_causes.candidate: STATUS='unknown' creates or truncates the restart file
evidence_for: STATUS='unknown' is weaker than STATUS='old' for a required restart file
evidence_against: the required file existed in the immutable manifest
the failure backtrace is an array operation rather than file open failure

candidate_causes.candidate: MPI local fifth-dimension versus explicit dummy global bound mismatch
evidence_for: the actual MPI allocation uses nirg_loc while wigner_divide_ndegen_epmat declares the fifth dummy extent as nrr_g
evidence_against: the observed execution was serial where nirg_loc equals nrr_g
the observed failure does not test MPI behavior

diagnosis.statement: The pinned serial epwread path lacks the epmatwp allocation required after the normal build_wannier allocation block is bypassed.

minimal_patch_design.strategy: Move the existing epmatwp allocation and zero initialization immediately before the MPI preprocessor branch so both serial and MPI readers share exactly one allocation.
minimal_patch_design.serial_shape: nirg_loc equals nrr_g on one process

proof_obligations.mpi_shape_unchanged: supported_by moving rather than changing the allocation expression

claim_boundary: This source diagnosis supports a missing serial restart allocation as the cause of the observed harness failure and defines an inert minimal patch. It does not validate the patch at runtime, establish MPI correctness, restore exporter attribution, or authorize scientific calculations.
